headline: A Look At Palantir Technologies (PLTR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Palantir Technologies (PLTR) is back in focus for investors after recent trading has left the stock down about 8% over the past month, despite modest gains over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Palantir Technologies. That recent 8% decline over the past month sits within a softer year to date share price return of about 20% down, even though the 1 year total shareholder return is 6% and the 3 year total shareholder return is more than 10x. If Palantir’s recent swings have you...

headline: Trump’s Palantir Share Purchase Puts Governance And Valuation In Focus
summary: President Donald Trump personally purchased shares of Palantir Technologies (NasdaqGS:PLTR) before publicly praising the company. This is the first reported instance of a sitting U.S. president buying stock in a defense technology company ahead of an endorsement. The move is drawing attention to potential conflicts of interest, disclosure practices, and governance standards. Palantir, listed on NasdaqGS:PLTR, builds data analytics platforms used by government and commercial clients,...
